text: Moon and Selkie were bound by a promise made at the Core of the Moon.

name: Moon
text: If the tide takes me first, keep flying.

name: Selkie
text: Only if you promise to keep chasing me.
The promise survived. The world around it did not.
Flowers of impossible light spread over the sea, and every wish left a thorn.

name: Moon
text: I named my ship Sunset because it carries every ending I could not accept.

name: Selkie
text: Then Sunrise will be the answer. I will bring you back from the dark.
Neither pilot could tell who was fleeing and who was following.
Across ten moonlit stages, the chase tightens toward the place it began.
Tonight, the pilot you choose will decide which heart must be faced.
